narrative:
Parkman Twp township has 1,617 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
